templateInputs.acceptanceCriteria: Vote up only if the connect, refresh, and vote flow works without manual recovery.
templateInputs.environmentHints: Test desktop Chrome with MetaMask; include mobile or Ledger notes only if tried.
templateInputs.expectedBehavior: A user can connect a wallet, refresh the page, and still submit a vote.
templateInputs.knownLimitations: Ledger is not included in this preview.
templateInputs.outOfScope: Do not judge visual polish unless it blocks completion.
templateInputs.testSteps: 1. Open the preview. 2. Connect MetaMask. 3. Refresh. 4. Submit a vote on the test question.

question.title: Does this wallet preview work as specified?
question.description: Open the linked preview and follow the listed test steps. Vote down if the feature fails, requires manual recovery, or is too confusing to complete.
